name: Pixie Dust Fertilizer
effect: Increase the base production of Farms by +98. Reduces cost multiplier by 0.02 (becomes 1.13).

name: Fairy Workers
effect: Increase the production of Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths by 10,000%.

name: Kind Hearts
effect: Increases maximum Mana additively based on Good buildings owned.
formula: +(1.3 * x ^ 0.7), where x is Good buildings owned

name: Fairy Cuisine
effect: Increase the base production of Inns by +234. Reduce building cost multiplier by 0.02 (becomes 1.13).

name: Golden Pots
effect: Additively increase clicking reward by 20% of production of Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths combined.

name: Spellsmith
effect: Blacksmiths also increase your Mana Regeneration.
formula: +(2.75 * x ^ 0.275), where x is Blacksmiths owned

name: Starmetal Alloys
effect: Increase the base production of Blacksmiths by +580. Reduces cost multiplier by 0.02 (becomes 1.13).

name: Rainbow Link
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths owned.
formula: (0.75 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is Farms + Inns + Blacksmiths

name: Swarm of Fairies
effect: Gain assistants based on Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths owned.
formula: +(1.2 * x ^ 0.6), where x is Farms + Inns + Blacksmiths

name: Bubble Swarm
effect: Increase maximum Mana based on the highest Swarming Towers built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(x ^ 1.05), where x is highest Swarming Towers this Reincarnation

name: Pheromones
effect: Gain assistants additively based on time spent as Chaos this Reincarnation.
formula: +(80 * x ^ 0.8), where x is Chaos time this Reincarnation

name: Dream Catchers
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Chaos spells cast this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.2 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is Chaos spells cast this Reincarnation
